traits.locale_text:
When the user is hit for the first time in a round, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} temporary wounds for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was blocked, dodged, or parried. Does not stack.
The user's armour is increased by +{uip|Armour|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}%.

When the user is hit for the first time in a round, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} temporary wounds for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was blocked, dodged, or parried. Does not stack.
The user's armour is increased by +{uip|Armour|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}%.

This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

The user's armour is increased by +{uip|Armour|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}%.

This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|Armour|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}%.

languages.text: Когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g} впервые за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, он получает +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временного здоровья{/g} на 1 раунд. Этот эффект срабатывает, даже если атака встретила {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блок{/g}, от нее {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонились{/g} или она была {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}. Эффект не суммируется.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

Когда по обладателю аугмента {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}попадают{/g} впервые за {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g}, он получает +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временного здоровья{/g} на 1 раунд. Этот эффект срабатывает, даже если атака встретила {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}блок{/g}, от нее {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклонились{/g} или она была {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}парирована{/g}. languages.text: Cuando el usuario recibe un {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g} por primera vez en cada {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, gana +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} durante 1 asalto. Este efecto se activa incluso aunque el ataque se haya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloqueado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivado{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parado{/g}, pero no es acumulativo.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Cuando el usuario recibe un {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}impacto{/g} por primera vez en cada {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}, gana +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} durante 1 asalto. Este efecto se activa incluso aunque el ataque se haya {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloqueado{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivado{/g} o {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parado{/g}, pero no es acumulativo.

languages.text: Erleidet der Nutzer in einer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} den ersten {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g}, erhält er 1 Runde lang +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden{/g}. Dieser Effekt wird auch im Falle eines {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}geblockten{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausgewichenen{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parierten{/g} Angriffs ausgelöst. Nicht stapelbar.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Erleidet der Nutzer in einer {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} den ersten {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}Treffer{/g}, erhält er 1 Runde lang +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden{/g}. Dieser Effekt wird auch im Falle eines {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}geblockten{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausgewichenen{/g} oder {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parierten{/g} Angriffs ausgelöst. Nicht stapelbar.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, bir {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} ilk kez {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulduğunda{/g} +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Bu etki, saldırıya karşı {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} yapılsa bile tetiklenir. Etki üst üste birikmez.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Kullanıcı, bir {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rauntta{/g} ilk kez {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}vurulduğunda{/g} +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer. Bu etki, saldırıya karşı {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloklama{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} veya {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}savuşturma{/g} yapılsa bile tetiklenir. Etki üst üste birikmez.

languages.text: Lorsque l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g} pour la première fois au cours d'un {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, il gagne +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} pendant 1 round. Cet effet se déclenche même si l'attaque est {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivée{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g}. Non cumulable.
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: Lorsque l'utilisateur est {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}touché{/g} pour la première fois au cours d'un {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, il gagne +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} pendant 1 round. Cet effet se déclenche même si l'attaque est {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}bloquée{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquivée{/g} ou {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parée{/g}. Non cumulable.

languages.text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}首次被{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}时，使用者获得{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}点{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，持续1轮。即使攻击被{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}，此效果也会触发。此效果不可叠加。
languages.original_text: When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.

traits.locale_text: 每{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}首次被{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中{/g}时，使用者获得{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}点{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，持续1轮。即使攻击被{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}格挡{/g}、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}或{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}招架{/g}，此效果也会触发。此效果不可叠加。

languages.text:
使用者が{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g} で初めて{g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}命中したとき{/g}、1 ラウンドの間、+{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時的な傷{/g} を得る。この効果は、攻撃が{g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}ブロックされた場合{/g} 、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}かわされた場合{/g} 、{g|Encyclopedia:Parry}かわされた場合{/g} でも発動する。スタックしない。
使用者の{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}アーマー{/g} は+{uip|Armour|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}%増加する。
languages.original_text:
When the user is {g|Encyclopedia:HitSequenceGlossary}hit{/g} for the first time in a {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}, they gain +{uip|THP|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} for 1 round. This effect triggers even if the attack was {g|Encyclopedia:BlockChance}blocked{/g}, {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodged{/g}, or {g|Encyclopedia:Parry}parried{/g}. Does not stack.
The user's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g} is increased by +{uip|Armour|5bd6da4f96974ca29df16a5b5f7dd9ef}%.
